gopay._comment: GoPay payment configuration. When OTP is not filled by default, it falls back to CLI; at WebUI runtime, a SQLite-backed HTTP OTP endpoint will be injected.

protocol._comment: Optional: X-E1/X-E2 protocol signature. Disabled by default; after filling in runtime keys, gopay.py can first attempt signed pin-token, then fallback to the original /nb.
protocol._v2_comment: 2026-05-14 reverse 完成：sign_version='v2' 走 HMAC-SHA256(K, msg) + HMAC cipher chain + device-static X-E2。需 display_encoder_key (frida memscan from libbatteryOpt+0x92948) + signed_msg_template (frida 抓 SHA-82394 outer hash input)。
protocol._direct_pin_comment: 纯协议直付时改成 pin_token_mode=direct + /api/v1/users/pin/tokens，并提供 pin_public_key_pem/path。
